L1.description: Click B (toggle wbze wall to open lower passage), navigate UP and RIGHT to bgeg zone, click A (toggle bgeg to vertical column for upper passage), navigate UP, click B (re-toggle wbze to open upper passage), navigate UP and RIGHT to goal

clicks.purpose: toggle wbze walls (tag b) - open lower wall
toggle bgeg (tag a) - create vertical intangible column
toggle wbze walls (tag b) - open upper wall

L1.keyboard_moves: 5 UP + 5 RIGHT + 3 UP + 2 UP + 2 RIGHT = 17 moves
L1.path: Player(10,30) -> UP to (10,20) -> RIGHT to (20,20) -> UP to (20,14) -> UP to (20,10) -> RIGHT to (24,10) = Goal

mechanics.key_insight: Two wbze walls (tag b) toggle together. Click B opens one but closes the other. Must pass through lower wall first, then toggle back to open upper wall. Click A changes bgeg decoration from horizontal bar to vertical column providing intangible path in the gap.
